Notes
[1] Concealable as or under clothing.
[2] Partial coverage: sandals give DR 1 to the underside of the foot, while breastplates protect only from the front.
[3] Split DR: use the lower DR against crushing attacks.
[4] Helmet gives wearer the No Peripheral Vision disadvantage (p. 151) while worn.
